title: Arshgranthawali, Shrimad Bhagwadgita
gloss: The Arshgranthawali Series, Volume VI, No 3, for March 1910. The text of the Gita with Hindi translation and an independent commentary by Pandit Raja Ram.
notes: Subscription serial publication of scripture. [Previous issue noticed in entry No. 9 at page 40 of the Catalogue for the quarter ending the 30th June, 1910.]

title: Arshgranthawali, Shrimad Bhagwadgita, Volume VI, No. 4 for April 1910
Arshgranthawali, Shrimad Bhagwadgita, Volume VI, No 5, for May 1910
notes: Title dash-continuation of serial 14; completes Volume VI of the Gita series.

title: Rigveda Sanhita, Anks 45—46
gloss: The text of the Rigveda with Hindi translation and an independent Hindi commentary compiled by R. B. Shiv Nath.
notes: Serialized Rigveda (parts 45–46, pages 1985–2080) from Multan Cantonment. [Previous issue noticed in entry No. 11 at page 40 of the Catalogue for the quarter ending the 30th June, 1910.]

author: Ali Bakhsh, Raja
title: Suwang Nehalde
gloss: The ancient story of Nala and Damyanti in the form of a drama.
copyright: Sayad Maqbul Husain, Rewári; No. 114, dated the 20th July 1910.
notes: Same Rewari swang author/press/copyright cluster as p27 s7 (copyright Nos. 114–116 consecutive).

section: BILINGUAL (PERSIAN AND PUNJABI, IN PERSIAN CHARACTER)—POETRY.
author: Ghulam Mustafa, Hafiz
title: Shajra-i-Tayyabah-i-Qadiriya ma Shajra-i-Naqshbandiya
gloss: The Geneological tables of the Qadiriya and Naqshbandiya Orders of Sufis tracing their descent from the prophet Muhammad.
notes: Sufi silsila genealogies — third shajra publication this quarter (compare p21 s237, p22 s238).

section: BILINGUAL (PUNJABI IN PERSIAN CHARACTER AND URDU)—MISCELLANEOUS.
author: Fateh Muhammad, Hafiz
title: Munasirah-i-Hir wa Qazi
gloss: Verses describing a controversy between Hir and a Qazi who tries to persuade her to abandon the love of her paramour, Ranjha, annotated by Qutb Ali Shah.
notes: Hir versus the Qazi — the folk-romance disputation episode, published by a pir.
